feature: Facturas Proveedor UI Cleanup: Simplified table actions, dropdown menu, action toolbar in modal
summary: Complete frontend testing of Facturas Proveedor UI cleanup. All tests passed. Table now shows 4 action icons per row (Ver, Editar, PDF, More menu). Three-dot menu opens dropdown with contextual options based on factura estado. Ver/Editar modal has action toolbar with contextual buttons. PDF dark background issue fixed with explicit white background CSS.

Table_4_action_icons.details: Each row shows exactly 4 action buttons: Ver (eye), Editar (pencil), PDF (download), More (three-dot menu). Edit button hidden for ANULADA facturas.

Three_dot_menu_dropdown.details: Clicking three-dot menu opens dropdown with contextual options. Dropdown closes on outside click.

Dropdown_PENDIENTE_options.details: PENDIENTE factura with saldo shows: Registrar Pago, Canjear por Letras, Vincular Ingresos, Eliminar

Dropdown_CANJEADO_options.details: CANJEADO factura shows: Ver Letras, Vincular Ingresos

Dropdown_PAGADO_options.details: PAGADO factura shows: Ver Pagos, Vincular Ingresos

Ver_modal_toolbar.details: Ver modal shows action toolbar below header with contextual buttons (PDF always, Registrar Pago if has saldo, Canjear Letras if pendiente, Ver Letras if canjeado)

Toolbar_button_actions.details: Toolbar buttons close modal and open respective modal (Pago, Letras, Ver Pagos, Ver Letras, Vincular Ingresos)

PAGADO_column_clickable.details: PAGADO column amount (green text) is clickable and opens Ver Pagos modal

CANJEADO_badge_clickable.details: CANJEADO badge has cursor:pointer and clicking opens Ver Letras modal

PDF_dark_background_fix.details: PDF generation uses explicit white background CSS: background-color: #ffffff !important; color-scheme: light; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact

tests_executed.name: Table shows 4 action icons per row
Toolbar Registrar Pago opens Pago modal
Toolbar Canjear Letras opens Letras modal
Toolbar Ver Letras opens Ver Letras modal
PAGADO column amount clickable opens Ver Pagos
CANJEADO badge clickable opens Ver Letras
Dropdown Canjear por Letras action works

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: FC-00009 (CANJEADO), FP-2026-00003 (PENDIENTE), FP-2026-00002 (PENDIENTE), FP-2026-00001 (PAGADO)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Facturas Proveedor UI cleanup complete. Table actions simplified to 4 icons (Ver, Editar, PDF, More). Three-dot menu data-testid: menu-factura-{id}, dropdown: dropdown-factura-{id}. Toolbar data-testid: factura-toolbar with buttons toolbar-pdf, toolbar-pagar, toolbar-vincular, toolbar-ver-pagos, toolbar-letras, toolbar-ver-letras. PAGADO column has clickable amounts (btn-link class). CANJEADO badge is clickable with cursor:pointer.
